content: i usually just reset queue if it's been longer than 3 minutes. usually that speeds things up

守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于4月21日21:20(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年5月5日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【问题修复】
一、故事
● 通讯器
    ○ 修复了「通讯器」中缺少「阿拉克涅」日常对话的问题。
● 秘典书库
    ○ 修复了「秘典书库」的「活动」中「24」活动背景动画显示异常的问题。
 
二、战斗
● 唤醒体
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「波吕克斯」激活最终法则且释放灵知觉醒后，下回合开始时圣心不再因「最终法则」效果额外施加「出血」的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「茉夏」激活最终法则且释放灵知觉醒后，触发死亡抵抗后会错误的将 1 张「人间爆破」置入手中的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「杜勒赛因」激活最终法则且释放灵知觉醒后，其它唤醒体造成击杀时也会触发杜勒赛因「最终法则」效果的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「24」激活最终法则时，若先释放了狂气爆发，再释放灵知觉醒，「人格加成效果翻倍」于本回合中未能暂时失效的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「阿拉克涅」的技能「无尽线缕」技能动画和攻击特效播放错误的问题。
    ○ 修复了英语语言设置下，唤醒体「阿拉克涅」的维度穿梭状态名错误地包含代码的问题。
● 界域
    ○ 修复了因「折跃」刻印而临时增加「超维空间上限」时，发动超维空间后未能正确移除「额外超维空间上限」的问题。
    ○ 修复了连续点击「发动超维空间」按钮进入「奇点·超维」界域空间时，会因错误地触发回合结束导致立即结束超维回合的问题。   
    ○ 修复了发动超维空间时，若「奥尔拉」处于「喜」情绪，会错误地弃置应当保留在手中卡牌的问题。   
    ○ 修复了携带命轮「诗笺的句尾」时，发动超维空间后「下次释放的钥令生效 2 次」未能正确生效的问题。
    ○ 修复了携带命轮「核心熔解」时，发动超维空间后未能获得临时力量和戒备的问题。
    ○ 修复了携带命轮「扭曲的骑士诗」时，发动超维空间后未能获得「神焰」状态的问题。
    ○ 修复了携带命轮「圣子尊荣」时，发动超维空间后未能获得「心火」状态的问题。
    ○ 修复了持有忘却篇造物「辉光沙漏」时，发动超维空间后无法获得算力的问题。 
    ○ 修复了持有忘却篇造物「三棱镜」时，发动超维空间后无法获得临时力量的问题。
    ○ 修复了持有造物「时灵摆 · 间隙」时，发动超维空间后无法获得力量和暴击伤害的问题。
    ○ 修复了持有星辰篇造物「辉光沙漏」时，发动超维空间后打出的首张卡牌未能生效多次的问题。
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了持有星辰篇造物「金色梦乡」、皮克曼创构的造物「金色梦乡」且触发吞噬时，触发吞噬的唤醒体也能够获得狂气的问题。
    ○ 修复了敌人「渊狱蜘群」的状态「集群效应」描述错误的问题。修复后的描述为召唤一名「渊狱蜘群」或「冷蜘群」。
● 相位对弈
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「阿拉克涅」的狂气爆发「命途，依此谕示」施加的状态在目标死亡后仍然存在的问题。
 
 三、界面与功能
● 时间原点
    ○ 修复了对 SSR 命轮使用「时间原点」后，某些情况下「叠位」按钮未显示导致无法回溯的问题。
    ○ 修复了同时拥有「时间原点」和「空幻之芯」时，「时间原点」详细信息会错误地显示「即将转化为无垢之芯」的问题。
    ○ 修复了使用「时间原点」后回溯功能截止时间错误的问题，修复后跟使用的「时间原点」截止时间一致。
● 唤醒
    ○ 修复了「界域研习」唤醒的「指定界域」界面中，界域名字丢失的问题。
● 密境课室
    ○ 修复了「日常试训」中领取「现实起点」时，若「现实起点」已达持有上限，领取确认窗口的动画播放异常的问题。
    ○ 修复了「密境课室」中，部分唤醒体未能显示全部推荐密契的问题。
● 疾驰的欢愉专列
    ○ 修复了「贵宾名录」的赛季排行中，调查头衔文本与底部标签未对齐的问题。
● 活动
    ○ 修复了「学园礼赠」中有可领取奖励时，红点提示未显示的问题。 
● 细节
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「塔薇」全身立绘和部分情况下「威廉」的立绘清晰度不足的问题。 
    ○ 修复了繁体中文语言设置下，「融蚀」错误翻译为「腐蚀」的问题。
V2.5.0.2 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on April 21 at 21:20(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on May 5, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update content]
1. Story
● Communicator
    ○ Fixed an issue where daily conversations with "Arachne" were missing from the "Communicator."
● Library
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "24" event background animation displayed abnormally in the "Events" section of the "Library".

2. Combat
● Awakener
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after the Awakener "Pollux" activated Absolute Axiom and unleashed Gnosis Rouse, the Sacred Heart would no longer apply additional "Bleed" due to the "Absolute Axiom" Effect at the start of the next turn.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after Awakener "Mouchette" activated Absolute Axiom and Unleashed Rouse, triggering Death Resistance would incorrectly place 1 "Mortal Blast" into hand.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after the Awakener "Doresain" activated Absolute Axiom and unleashed Rouse, kills made by other Awakeners would also trigger Doresain's "Absolute Axiom" Effect.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when Awakener "24" activates Absolute Axiom, if Exalt was Unleashed first followed by Rouse, the "Personality Bonus Effect Doubled" would fail to temporarily deactivate during that turn.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Arachne"'s skill "Infinite Skein" had incorrect skill animation and attack effect playback.
    ○ Fixed an issue in the English language setting where the Dimension Shuttle State name of the Awakener "Arachne" incorrectly contained code.

● Realm
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Extra Ultra Space Cap" was not correctly removed after activating Ultra Space when the Ultra Space Cap was temporarily increased due to the "Warp" Orison.
    ○ Fixed an issue where rapidly clicking the "Activate Ultra Space" button to enter the "Singularity: Ultra" Realm could incorrectly trigger an end-of-turn effect, causing the Ultra Round to end immediately   
    ○ Fixed an issue where activating Ultra Space while "Horla" was in the "Happiness" mood would incorrectly discard Cards that should have been Retained in hand   
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when carrying the Wheel of Destiny "The Last Verse," the effect "The next Posse Unleashed takes effect 2 times" after activating Ultra Space would not trigger correctly.
    ○ Fixed an issue where carrying the Wheel of Destiny "Core Meltdown" failed to gain Temporary STR and Alert after activating Ultra Space.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when equipping the Wheel of Destiny "Twisted Knight Ballad", the "Ablaze" State was not obtained after activating Ultra Space.
    ○ Fixed an issue where "Divus's Honor" from the Wheel of Destiny failed to grant the "Alight" State after activating Ultra Space.
    ○ Fixed an issue where Arithmetica could not be gained after activating Ultra Space while holding the Faded Legacy Relic "Luminous Hourglass" 
    ○ Fixed an issue where Temporary STR could not be gained after activating Ultra Space while holding the Faded Legacy Relic "Trigon Prism".
    ○ Fixed an issue where holding the Relic "Chrono Pendulum · Interval" would prevent gaining Strength and Crit. DMG after activating Ultra Space.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the first Card played after activating Ultra Space while holding the Astral Reign Relic "Luminous Hourglass" failed to take effect multiple times.
● Stage
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when holding the Astral Reign Relic "Gilded Reverie" or the Pickman Painted Relic "Gilded Reverie" and triggering Devour, the Awakener that triggered Devour could also gain Aliemus.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the State "Cluster Effect" of the enemy "Abyssal Spider Cluster" had an incorrect description. The corrected description is: Summon an "Abyssal Spider Cluster" or "Frost Spider Cluster".

● Traphase
    ○ Fixed an issue where the State applied by Awakener "Arachne"'s Exalt "Moira, As I Decree" persisted after the target's death.

 3. Interface and Features
● Origin of Time
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after using "Origin of Time" on an SSR Wheel of Destiny, the "Ascension" button failed to appear in certain situations, preventing players from performing a Reset.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when possessing both "Origin of Time" and "Ethereal Core," the "Origin of Time" details would incorrectly display "About to transform into Pure Core."
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Reset function's cutoff time was incorrect after using "Origin of Time." After the fix, it is now consistent with the cutoff time of the "Origin of Time" used.
● Awaken
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Realm name was missing in the "Designated Realm" interface when Awakening "Realms Research".
● Handbook
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Daily Drills" where, when claiming "Reality Verge" while it had reached the In Hand limit, the animation for the claim confirmation window would play abnormally.
    ○ Fixed an issue in the "Handbook" where some Awakeners failed to display all recommended Covenants.
● Hectic Skybound Rail
    ○ Fixed an issue in the "VIP List" seasonal rankings where the survey title text was not aligned with the bottom tab.
● Event
    ○ Fixed an issue where the red dot notification was not displaying when there were claimable rewards in "Gifts from Mythag" 
● Details
    ○ Fixed an issue where the full-body illustration of Awakener "Tawil" and the illustration of "William" in certain situations had insufficient clarity 
    ○ Fixed an issue where "Dissolution" was incorrectly translated as "Corrosion" in the Traditional Chinese language settings.
So Fouette wasn't a bug?
